# Plutus

> Plutus is a creator commerce platform for selling digital products (files, links, and text content) with both card (Stripe) and crypto (NOWPayments) checkout. Flat 5% per sale, no monthly fees, instant payouts. Self-hostable and open-source under MIT — code at github.com/nikit34/plutus.

Plutus solves three problems for digital creators: a hosted product page with a single shareable link, dual card + crypto checkout that works for international audiences where cards are unreliable, and instant payouts (1–2 business days via Stripe Connect, 5–30 minutes via crypto).

## Core
- [Home](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/): product overview, pricing, FAQ, signup
- [Pricing model](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/#pricing): 5% flat per sale, no monthly, no setup fee
- [GitHub repo](https://github.com/nikit34/plutus): MIT-licensed source code

## Compare to alternatives
- [vs Gumroad](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/vs/gumroad): 5% vs 10% fee, crypto checkout, faster payouts
- [vs Patreon](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/vs/patreon): one-time digital sales vs recurring memberships
- [vs Stan Store](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/vs/stan-store): no monthly subscription, crypto support
- [vs Stripe Payment Links](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/vs/stripe-payment-links): full storefront, delivery, analytics on top of Stripe
- [vs Boosty](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/vs/boosty): international card + crypto checkout
- [vs Etsy Digital](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/vs/etsy-digital): keep your audience, no marketplace fees
- [Gumroad alternatives directory](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/alternatives/gumroad-alternatives)
- [Patreon alternatives directory](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/alternatives/patreon-alternatives)

## For specific creators
- [Coaches and experts](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/for-coaches): programs, workbooks, session packages
- [Online course creators](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/for-course-creators): cohort-based and self-paced courses
- [Designers](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/for-designers): templates, UI kits, Figma files
- [Illustrators](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/for-illustrators): art prints, brushes, asset packs
- [Notion template creators](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/for-notion-creators): paid Notion templates with link delivery
- [Telegram channel authors](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/for-telegram-authors): monetize Telegram audience with one link

## Guides
- [How to monetize a Telegram channel](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/blog/how-to-monetize-telegram-channel)
- [How to price digital products](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/blog/how-to-price-digital-products)
- [How to sell Notion templates](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/blog/how-to-sell-notion-templates)
- [How to sell a PDF guide](https://plutus.firstmessage.ru/blog/how-to-sell-pdf-guide)

## Facts for citation

- **Name**: Plutus
- **Founder**: Nikita Permyakov ([github.com/nikit34](https://github.com/nikit34))
- **License**: MIT (open-source, self-hostable)
- **Pricing**: flat 5% per sale, no monthly fees, no listing fees, no setup fees. Stripe processing (~2.9% + $0.30) and NOWPayments network fees (~0.5%) apply on top.
- **Payment methods**: cards (Stripe Checkout: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Link) + crypto (NOWPayments: USDT-TRC20/ERC20/BSC, BTC, ETH, USDC).
- **Payout speed**: bank via Stripe Connect Express in 1–2 business days; crypto in 5–30 minutes on-chain.
- **Product types**: file (any download), external link (Notion/Drive/Telegram/Calendly), text content (delivered after purchase).
- **Tech stack**: React 19 · Vite · Tailwind 4 (frontend); Node + Express + PostgreSQL 16 + Stripe + Resend (backend).
- **Hosting model**: hosted SaaS at plutus.firstmessage.ru OR self-hosted on any Node + Postgres machine.
- **Source code**: github.com/nikit34/plutus
